ComponentType: Single-Cell Lithium-Ion Battery Linear Charger IC
Description: The TP4056 is a complete constant-current/constant-voltage linear charger for single-cell lithium-ion batteries. It integrates a power MOSFET, eliminating the need for an external sense resistor and blocking diode. It features programmable charge current up to 1000mA via an external resistor, a fixed 4.2V float voltage, and automatic charge termination when the current drops to 1/10 of the set value. Additional functions include thermal regulation, battery temperature monitoring, under-voltage lockout (UVLO), automatic recharge, and status indication outputs. It operates from a 4.0V to 6.5V supply and is offered in an ESOP-8 package.

KeyParameters.**Thermal Regulation**: Yes (Reduces charge current to limit die temperature)
KeyParameters.**Charge Termination Method**: C/10 (Current falls to 1/10 of programmed value)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Battery Temperature Sense Input (Connect to NTC thermistor network or ground)
Constant-Charge Current Setting and Charge Enable. Connect a resistor to GND to set current.
Charge Status Output (Open-Drain). Goes low when charging is complete and VBAT is in regulation.
Charge Status Output (Open-Drain). Active low when the IC is in charging state.
Chip Enable Input (Active High). A logic high enables the charger. Pull low to disable.
